title: malva aurantiacorubra
intro: Malva aurantiacorubra, also known as the Orange Mallow, is a plant species in the mallow family, characterized by its bright orange flowers and edible leaves. The medicinal properties of Malva aurantiacorubra include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Malva aurantiacorubra include soothing digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Malva aurantiacorubra include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
